title: The Exegesis of Philip K. Dick — Page 41
raw_text:
Jim's, Mrs. Chambers, who I once met. Also, Jim was a Latin scholar. His
specialty, in fact, his joy in life.
I am freaked, when you consider his book The Other Side, about the dead
coming through to the living. He gave credit to me in its foreword, for
research work.
Love,
Phil
work_title: The Exegesis of Philip K. Dick
